instructions: Hand the object from one gripper to the other.
Pass the rod from one hand to the other hand.
Transfer the object between your two grippers.
Pick up the rod with one gripper and hand it off to the other.
Grab the rod and pass it across to the opposite gripper.
Perform a handover of the rod from one end-effector to the other.
Use one hand to grasp the rod, then transfer it to the other hand.
Move the object from the initial gripper to the opposite one.
Pick up the rod and hand it over to the other arm.
Complete a gripper-to-gripper transfer of the rod.
